BattDeck F-Droid Repository

Official custom F-Droid repository for BattDeck.

Currently it serves 3 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://zarant77.github.io/batt-deck/fdroid/repo

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
9F E1 B1 B8 5F 40 2E B9 D8 ED AF 20 1B 4D D6 88 28 63 5C BA A7 22 90 E2 83 AE D5 4E A8 0E 22 01
